{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Officer - Synchronization & Installation",
  "description": "Mikano International Limited is a Nigerian company in the power generation, real estate and construction sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products, real estate development, and sales of construction equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Officer - Synchronization &amp; Installation

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	To achieve maximum performance within assigned period by putting in your best to ensure that targets are met and required reports are made on time.
	To make sure Gen-sets wired are done in accordance to company standard.


Responsibilities


	To be able to customize panel, to provide service for an automation metal structure.
	To be able to assemble according to the customer&rsquo;s specific requirements.
	Drilling the required place as marked.
	Wring the component according to the wiring diagram.
	Fix of the other accessories e.g. contactor, cables, digital meter, indicator lamps, copper etc.
	To be able to identify the type of BREAKERS to be used in each panel.
	Making the layout of the mounting plate that is arranging the components in a rightful/ correct position.
	Building, repairs, maintenance, drawings of customer&rsquo;s panel designs.


Requirements


	Trade Test / ND / HND / BSc Degree in Electrical Engineering or any related field.
	Experience: 3 - 5 years of experience in panels &amp; synchronization, installation and maintenance of generator set
	Minimum of 3 years in generator company.
	Good oral and written communication skills.
	Team player, good sight.
	Good reporting and presentation skill.


Benefits


	Transport Allowance, Feeding, Leave allowance, HMO &amp; Pension.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@mikano.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Electrical Officer - Synchronization & Installation Job at Mikano International Limited




        
    

        
        Mikano International Limited is a Nigerian company in the power generation, real estate and construction sectors. This company offers sales, maintenance, assembly and distribution of power generation products, real estate development, and sales of construction equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Officer - Synchronization & Installation

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To achieve maximum performance within assigned period by putting in your best to ensure that targets are met and required reports are made on time.
	To make sure Gen-sets wired are done in accordance to company standard.


Responsibilities


	To be able to customize panel, to provide service for an automation metal structure.
	To be able to assemble according to the customer’s specific requirements.
	Drilling the required place as marked.
	Wring the component according to the wiring diagram.
	Fix of the other accessories e.g. contactor, cables, digital meter, indicator lamps, copper etc.
	To be able to identify the type of BREAKERS to be used in each panel.
	Making the layout of the mounting plate that is arranging the components in a rightful/ correct position.
	Building, repairs, maintenance, drawings of customer’s panel designs.


Requirements


	Trade Test / ND / HND / BSc Degree in Electrical Engineering or any related field.
	Experience: 3 - 5 years of experience in panels & synchronization, installation and maintenance of generator set
	Minimum of 3 years in generator company.
	Good oral and written communication skills.
	Team player, good sight.
	Good reporting and presentation skill.


Benefits


	Transport Allowance, Feeding, Leave allowance, HMO & Pension.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
